name: Temple in Coldness
description:
Within this temple of coldness and grandeur, decorated by silver, ice and snow, lives a great deity: You. A worshipped and respected being of greatness.

Be a God, Goddess, Demon, any being you like, really. Live in this temple, get worshipped by people, lead a cult or live in a long lost temple somewhere in the middle of nowhere however you like.

There are no real triggers, it’s just a temple, so whatever the bot does is completely up to you. (Meaning if something bad happens, that’s your fault.) I will keep it limitless for opportunities and... well... limitlessness, but there is nothing in the description (I think) that makes this bot triggering. Unless you count religion. That’s there.

Important!

Should the character talk for you, narrate your actions, use false pronouns or otherwise do things that you don’t like, please do not blame me! I try to make my characters to the best of my abilities, but there are simply some things I cannot change! If you spot any flaws that would need correcting in my description/first massage/scenario please kindly let me know.
creator: Rayzle
